step_rationale: Saturated fatty acid; downregulated post-MI metabolite.
mechanism: Stearic acid depletion post-myocardial infarction indicates altered fatty acid oxidation and metabolic stress in damaged myocardium.

references.title: Nicotinamide riboside kinase-2 regulates metabolic adaptation in the ischemic heart.
Deep Lipidomics in Human Plasma: Cardiometabolic Disease Risk and Effect of Dietary Fat Modulation.
